concerns.detail: Disclosure of private email address (api@somastacks.com) associated with a professor's company, which could de-anonymize individuals linked to that domain
concerns.excerpt: 这两个图片的所有人都来自你公司api@somastacks.com这个邮箱

concerns.detail: Unsupported character attack attacking the subject's conscience and moral character rather than specific advising practices
concerns.excerpt: 你自己良心过得去吗？那么多intern那么多家庭花了这么多钱哈哈哈哈哈哈还真是,但哥们可能没有良心

concerns.detail: Poetic personal attack using inflammatory, dehumanizing language (敲骨吸髓, 画饼充饥) and unsupported character judgments
concerns.excerpt: 自诩多情浪漫客，云端指导马行空。门生寥落三两只，廉价ＲＡ满大营。画饼充饥谈岁月，敲骨吸髓算工分。
